name: Evolution Mining Limited
analysis: EVN has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 28% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.2× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$12.6400, stop A$10.1029, target A$14.1400 (0.59:1) — then trail it.
